fixtureDescription: Extremely repetitive passage using the same sentence frame ten times
passage: The implications of climate change are far-reaching. The implications of climate change are profound. The implications of climate change are devastating. The implications of climate change are undeniable. The implications of climate change are urgent. The implications of climate change require immediate action. The implications of climate change demand our attention. The implications of climate change cannot be overstated. The implications of climate change affect every nation. The implications of climate change will shape our future.

main topic and repeated throughout the passage as the central concept.|climate change|B2|This is a key collocational phrase referring to long-term shifts in global temperatures and weather patterns.|4|Critical for comprehension as it appears repeatedly and represents the core subject matter of the passage.|far-reaching|B2|This adjective describes something that has widespread effects or common.|future|B2|This noun refers to the time that will come after the present.|3|Helpful for understanding the temporal scope of climate change's effects, though it is a fundamental concept.|
